problem_statement: Runtime resilience claims need typed dry-run rehearsal evidence before any production chaos, staging chaos, or invariant-fuzz execution claim can be considered by the control plane.
success_criteria: ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport binds scenario refs, invariant refs, injection-point refs, expected containment refs, expected signal refs, required evidence refs, rollback guard refs, UAO refs, LifeMeaningJudgment refs, and result-bank digest refs

ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport blocks live chaos execution, production targeting, staging targeting, runtime disruption, network fault injection, service restart, data corruption, event-chain mutation, connector calls, secret access, filesystem writes, rollback execution, terminal closure, and success claims

ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport rejects authority drift, live scope drift, missing scenario evidence, missing rollback guards, raw runtime log retention, raw secret retention, result count drift, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
ChaosRehearsalExecutionReport is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: execution mode remains plan_only or deterministic_dry_run
production_target_allowed, staging_target_allowed, and destructive_injection_allowed remain false in the Foundation example
scenario plan and result bank evidence remain digest refs
rollback obligations must be declared before any live execution can be reconsidered
live execution, runtime disruption, event-chain mutation, connector calls, writes, and terminal closure remain false
